heroSubtitleForm: Delete a person entirely, or remove them from one collection only (partial update).
heroSubtitleResult: The API responded. See the summary below.
fullDeleteRich: Full delete: omit the collection query — the person is fully removed from face recognition and your project records.
partialDeleteRich: Remove from one collection: pass collection as a query param using the collection code (UUID), matching values stored on the person's collections array. The dropdown only lists collections this person belongs to (from GET person).
personHint: List from GET /v2/face-recognition/persons — same as Update Person.
noPeopleEmpty: No people found. Enroll someone first in Create Person.
emptyPickerNoMatch: No matching collections for this person (check GET person or list collections).
errSelectCollection: Select a collection to remove the person from.
resultNoPersonDocBody: The server returned no person document (typical after a full delete). Check the raw payload if you need details.
confirmDescFull: Delete this person completely from your project? This cannot be undone.
confirmDescCollection: Remove this person from the selected collection? If this was their only collection, the server may delete the person entirely.
apiRefOptionalQuery: Optional: ?collection=<collectionCodeUuid> (same id as on the person's collections list)
